title: Oligochaetochilus despectans
taxonomy: Oligochaetochilus despectans is a plant species within the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Oligochaetochilus and is considered a rare and unique orchid species. The classification of Oligochaetochilus despectans places it within the kingdom Plantae, specifically within the monocot group of flowering plants. Further classification details include its position within the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Cranichideae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other orchid species.
